name: SKILL.md Adoption: Vendor-Neutral Skill Discovery
description: SKILL.md is an open specification released by Anthropic in 2025 that standardizes how tools discover and auto-invoke procedural knowledge (skills, patterns, guides, rules). Instead of each tool (Claude, Cursor, VSCode, CLI) maintaining isolated skill registries, SKILL.md enables a single skill to be published once and auto-invoked across any tool that speaks the spec.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Adoção de SKILL.md
pt-BR.description: SKILL.md é uma especificação aberta lançada pela Anthropic em 2025 que padroniza descoberta e descrição de skills.
